title: Tata Motors is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Motors is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
